# render-detail

Per-plugin registrations section in the plugin detail pane. Contributes a
`PluginView.Section` that reads `node.facets["registrations"]` and lists each
runtime registration (MCP tools, jobs, trigger-events) with its formatted
`factory('label')` name and a per-row runtime tag (server / central).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-plugin registrations section in the plugin detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginViewSlots.Section` "registrations" → `RegistrationsDetailSection`
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginNode`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginViewSlots`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.RUNTIME_COLORS`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.Section`, `primitives/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/text.Text`
